# Test Puppeteer server error handling with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive environment variables
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=4s

# Start server
bg bash 'go run main.go'
sleep 1s

# Test invalid method call
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"invalid/method\"}" | go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Test invalid tool name
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 2, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"invalid_tool\"}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Test missing arguments
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 3, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"navigate\"}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Test invalid URL
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 4, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"navigate\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"not-a-url\"}}}" | timeout 5s go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Test unreachable URL (should fail gracefully)
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 5, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"navigate\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"http://1.2.3.4:12345\"}}}" | timeout 5s go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Test malformed JSON (should handle gracefully)
bash 'echo "invalid json" | go run main.go'
stdout 'error'

# Test empty request (should handle gracefully)  
bash 'echo "" | go run main.go'
stdout 'error'

# Test timeout on slow page (should fail fast)
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 6, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"screenshot\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"http://httpbin.org/delay/10\"}}}" | timeout 6s go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Cleanup
exec pkill -f "go run main.go" || true
